query:
SHOW CREATE TABLE tournament_phases;
SHOW COLUMNS FROM platform_settings LIKE 'adsEnabled';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wStqi96Bwp1QsN.a3b8e3def1a1 --database dJv8mGehu4r2vn8N2SWpLW --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE tournament_phases;
SHOW COLUMNS FROM platform_settings LIKE 'adsEnabled';
messages: `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
CONSTRAINT `tournament_phases_tournamentId_tournaments_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`tournamentId`) REFERENCES `tournaments` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION
Field	Type	Null	Key	Default	Extra
stdout:
Table	Create Table
tournament_phases	CREATE TABLE `tournament_phases` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `tournamentId` int NOT NULL,
  `key` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `label` varchar(128) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `order` int NOT NULL,
  `slots` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `isKnockout` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `tournament_phases_tournamentId_tournaments_id_fk` (`tournamentId`),
  CONSTRAINT `tournament_phases_tournamentId_tournaments_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`tournamentId`) REFERENCES `tournaments` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=60001
Field	Type	Null	Key	Default	Extra
adsEnabled	tinyint(1)	NO		1
